title: LIVE World Cup. Defeats for Red Devils opponents: Harry Kane beats New Zealand, Egypt go down against Brazil

news.title: LIVE World Cup. Defeats for Red Devils opponents: Harry Kane beats New Zealand, Egypt go down against Brazil

world.title: LIVE World Cup. Defeats for Red Devils opponents: Harry Kane beats New Zealand, Egypt go down against Brazil

environment.compositionIntent: All-over Lygia Clark-derived folded paper environment: modular seams, diagonal Against crossings, pale negative space, dark blue counterplanes, muted teal and warm earth accents.

contrast.notes: Warm paper light keeps the pale Clark field legible while a cool rim separates dark blue, teal, and black seam structures without adding non-brief glow.

guidance: Use for painted, paper, canvas, ink wash, graphite, stain, and transfer surfaces.
Represent texture through declarative surface controls and WebGPU-safe texture descriptors.
Use for all-over color fields, hard-edged planes, atmospheric bands, and flat graphic fields.
Prefer geometry layers or declarative texture descriptors over GLSL gradients.
Use for soft atmosphere, dust, floating pigment, and particulate halos.
Keep the particle logic deterministic and inspectable in data.
Use for WebGPU-safe color grading and output transforms.
Do not use legacy GLSL post passes for WebGPU project scenes.

params.compositionUse: Dominant enclosing Clark-like matte field; kept rooted at the origin so the camera-pinned shell and surrounding geometry remain stable.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available loose concept reference image directly and used it only for broad palette/value/composition mood.
Static draft validation succeeded with pass=true and no errors in checks/check-result.json.
Playwright preview attempt 1 succeeded and captured desktop screenshot previews/attempt-001/001-world-environment-draft-desktop.jpg.
Render evidence reported healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, nonBlankRatio 0.999961, dynamicRange 251.667, and paintedCoverageRatio 0.813513.

Screenshot shows a dominant surrounding Lygia Clark-derived matte environment: pale paper, dark blue, teal, beige/ochre folded planes, dense panel seams, hard diagonal crossings, and concentrated Against pressure through space.
Package report shows WebGPU-safe MeshBasicMaterial and LineBasicMaterial surfaces with no forbidden surfaces.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted: the draft is a real WebGPU-safe Three.js environment module with preview-supported visual dominance and artist/news specificity.

params.compositionUse: Primary Against pressure layer kept central/all-over but scaled down from isolated preview strength so diagonal crossings read through the environment instead of covering it.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected loose concept reference image directly; used it only for broad palette, value balance, angular density, and composition mood.
Static check succeeded for drafts/non-literal-flow-pressure.module.mjs with validation.pass true and no errors.
Playwright preview attempt 1 succeeded and produced previews/attempt-001/001-non-literal-flow-pressure-draft-desktop.jpg.

Desktop screenshot showed a nonblank all-over Clark-like hard-edge field: large modular planes, diagonal Against crossings, accordion-like folded gates, panel seams, muted teal/beige/paper/navy palette, and concentrated angular pressure chips.
Render report previews/attempt-001/desktop-render-report.json reported healthStatus ok, readiness ready, captureStatus ok, nonBlankRatio 0.999724, dynamicRange 254, and no render health facts.

workshopAcceptance: Attempt 2 Playwright desktop preview captured successfully and was nonblank/readable: dense all-over Clark-like modular grid cells, radial hinge symbols, diagonal hard-edge cuts, contour seams, and matte muted palette pressure field.

evidence.selfReview: Accepted after one compatibility revision; the final draft is a real WebGPU-safe Three.js module, not a placeholder or fallback.
